title: Fix broken link error for enum references

features.name: class parameter with typedef enum using parameter in enum value
features.description: Code should include a class with an integer parameter where a typedef enum inside the class defines an enum value using that parameter expression

features.name: enum reference outside enum definition scope
features.description: Code should include an enum item reference used in a variable assignment where the enum is defined inside a parameterized class

features.name: class instantiation with parameter value override
features.description: Code should include a class parameterized with int type being instantiated with an explicit parameter value override
